prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial studio portrait of a pale-skinned blonde woman with slicked-back hair standing in a three-quarter pose against a dramatic abstract impasto-painted backdrop. The model is shown from upper thighs to head, slightly left of center, shoulders bare, arms relaxed downward with one hand visible along the front of the dress. Cover the face with a smooth vertical rectangular blur in muted beige-gray so the portrait feels anonymous and conceptual. Dress her in a sculptural strapless metallic silver satin gown with exaggerated folded origami-like panels, sharp architectural ruffles at the bodice and hip, and a cool reflective sheen. The background should be a dense expressive oil-paint wall with large sweeping palette-knife strokes and thick textures; use exactly 5 dominant palette colors: deep navy, cobalt blue, teal, charcoal black, and metallic silver-white. Lighting is moody and directional from the upper left, emphasizing glossy skin, satin highlights, and raised paint texture, with deep shadows on the right. Style: luxury fashion magazine cover aesthetic, avant-garde couture, painterly abstract expressionism, cinematic contrast, realistic photography blended with fine-art backdrop, vertical 4:5 composition, no text, no logos, no watermark.
